commands.review_summary:
The PR persists QMD session export state, adds a size/mtime fast path with a missing-target rebuild fallback, and adds regression tests plus a changelog entry, with minor unrelated formatting churn.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level performance path: current main calls `buildSessionEntry` for every listed session file before the skip-write state, and `buildSessionEntry` reads/parses the transcript. I did not run a thousands-session timing reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is indicated because the remaining blockers are exact-head CI/proof-body gate follow-up and maintainer acceptance, not a concrete code defect in the patch.
